title: Find a person
intro: Search by name, building or city to see if someone has checked in. Can't find them? You can also report them as missing here.
galleryLink: 📸 Don't know the name? Look through the photos of missing people →
promptTitle: Type a name, building or city to search.
promptPrivacy: For privacy reasons we don't show a full list of people.
promptNotListed: Looking for someone who isn't listed?
noneBody: They may not have checked in yet. Share the link so they can mark themselves safe.
sourcesIntro: 🌐 Includes data from allied citizen efforts —
sourcesOutro: and more — integrated and attributed automatically every 6 hours. External information is shown as "unverified".
